Tool 调用系统

状态已完成
难度中等
预计阅读45 分钟
源文件markdown/05-tool-calling.md

Agent 生成档案

Section titled “Agent 生成档案”
  • 章节 ID：05-tool-calling
  • 章节摘要：理解 Tool 定义、注册、暴露给模型、执行、权限和结果回填的完整机制。
  • 章节元数据：/data/chapters.json
  • 源码映射：/data/source-map.json

主要源码路径

Section titled “主要源码路径”
  • packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts
  • packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts
  • packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts
  • packages/plugin/src/tool.ts

对应模块：study-output/02-opencode-function-outline.md 的 “2.5 Tool 调用系统”。
主要源码：packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts、packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts、packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts、packages/plugin/src/tool.ts。

0. 本章学习目标

Section titled “0. 本章学习目标”

你会学到：工具的统一接口是什么，内置工具和插件工具如何注册，OpenCode 如何把工具转成 AI SDK tool，工具执行上下文如何携带 session/message/permission，tool result 如何回到 processor。

1. 一句话讲明白

Section titled “1. 一句话讲明白”

Tool 调用系统是 OpenCode 的“行动层”：模型只能提出 tool call，真正的参数校验、权限检查、执行、截断、附件补 ID、状态回写都由 runtime 完成。来源：packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts:16-45、packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:24-116。

packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts:16-45 
16export type Context<M extends Metadata = Metadata> = {17  sessionID: SessionID18  messageID: MessageID19  agent: string20  abort: AbortSignal21  callID?: string22  extra?: { [key: string]: unknown }23  messages: MessageV2.WithParts[]24  metadata(input: { title?: string; metadata?: M }): Effect.Effect<void>25  ask(input: Omit<Permission.Request, "id" | "sessionID" | "tool">): Effect.Effect<void>26}2728export interface ExecuteResult<M extends Metadata = Metadata> {29  title: string30  metadata: M31  output: string32  attachments?: Omit<MessageV2.FilePart, "id" | "sessionID" | "messageID">[]33}3435export interface Def<36  Parameters extends Schema.Decoder<unknown> = Schema.Decoder<unknown>,37  M extends Metadata = Metadata,38> {39  id: string40  description: string41  parameters: Parameters42  jsonSchema?: JSONSchema743  execute(args: Schema.Schema.Type<Parameters>, ctx: Context): Effect.Effect<ExecuteResult<M>>44  formatValidationError?(error: unknown): string45}
packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:24-116 
24export const resolve = Effect.fn("SessionTools.resolve")(function* (input: {25  agent: Agent.Info26  model: Provider.Model27  session: Session.Info28  processor: Pick<SessionProcessor.Handle, "message" | "updateToolCall" | "completeToolCall">29  bypassAgentCheck: boolean30  messages: MessageV2.WithParts[]31  promptOps: TaskPromptOps32}) {33  using _ = log.time("resolveTools")34  const tools: Record<string, AITool> = {}35  const run = yield* EffectBridge.make()36  const plugin = yield* Plugin.Service37  const permission = yield* Permission.Service38  const registry = yield* ToolRegistry.Service39  const mcp = yield* MCP.Service40  const truncate = yield* Truncate.Service4142  const context = (args: Record<string, unknown>, options: ToolExecutionOptions): Tool.Context => ({43    sessionID: input.session.id,44    abort: options.abortSignal!,45    messageID: input.processor.message.id,46    callID: options.toolCallId,47    extra: { model: input.model, bypassAgentCheck: input.bypassAgentCheck, promptOps: input.promptOps },48    agent: input.agent.name,49    messages: input.messages,50    metadata: (val) =>51      input.processor.updateToolCall(options.toolCallId, (match) => {52        if (!["running", "pending"].includes(match.state.status)) return match53        return {54          ...match,55          state: {56            title: val.title,57            metadata: val.metadata,58            status: "running",59            input: args,60            time: { start: Date.now() },61          },62        }63      }),64    ask: (req) =>65      permission66        .ask({67          ...req,68          sessionID: input.session.id,69          tool: { messageID: input.processor.message.id, callID: options.toolCallId },70          ruleset: Permission.merge(input.agent.permission, input.session.permission ?? []),71        })72        .pipe(Effect.orDie),73  })7475  for (const item of yield* registry.tools({76    modelID: ModelID.make(input.model.api.id),77    providerID: input.model.providerID,78    agent: input.agent,79  })) {80    const schema = ProviderTransform.schema(input.model, ToolJsonSchema.fromTool(item))81    tools[item.id] = tool({82      description: item.description,83      inputSchema: jsonSchema(schema),84      execute(args, options) {85        return run.promise(86          Effect.gen(function* () {87            const ctx = context(args, options)88            yield* plugin.trigger(89              "tool.execute.before",90              { tool: item.id, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: ctx.callID },91              { args },92            )93            const result = yield* item.execute(args, ctx)94            const output = {95              ...result,96              attachments: result.attachments?.map((attachment) => ({97                ...attachment,98                id: PartID.ascending(),99                sessionID: ctx.sessionID,100                messageID: input.processor.message.id,101              })),102            }103            yield* plugin.trigger(104              "tool.execute.after",105              { tool: item.id, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: ctx.callID, args },106              output,107            )108            if (options.abortSignal?.aborted) {109              yield* input.processor.completeToolCall(options.toolCallId, output)110            }111            return output112          }),113        )114      },115    })116  }

2. 它在 OpenCode agent 中的位置

Section titled “2. 它在 OpenCode agent 中的位置”

SessionPrompt.runLoop 会调用 SessionTools.resolve 准备工具；LLM.stream 把这些工具交给模型；模型产生 tool-call 后，AI SDK 调用工具的 execute；执行结果被 processor 写回 ToolPart。来源：packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1372-1440、packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:75-116、packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:169-193。

packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1372-1440 
1372            const tools = yield* SessionTools.resolve({1373              agent,1374              session,1375              model,1376              processor: handle,1377              bypassAgentCheck,1378              messages: msgs,1379              promptOps,1380            }).pipe(1381              Effect.provideService(Plugin.Service, plugin),1382              Effect.provideService(Permission.Service, permission),1383              Effect.provideService(ToolRegistry.Service, registry),1384              Effect.provideService(MCP.Service, mcp),1385              Effect.provideService(Truncate.Service, truncate),1386            )13871388            if (lastUser.format?.type === "json_schema") {1389              tools["StructuredOutput"] = createStructuredOutputTool({1390                schema: lastUser.format.schema,1391                onSuccess(output) {1392                  structured = output1393                },1394              })1395            }13961397            if (step === 1)1398              yield* summary.summarize({ sessionID, messageID: lastUser.id }).pipe(Effect.ignore, Effect.forkIn(scope))13991400            if (step > 1 && lastFinished) {1401              for (const m of msgs) {1402                if (m.info.role !== "user" || m.info.id <= lastFinished.id) continue1403                for (const p of m.parts) {1404                  if (p.type !== "text" || p.ignored || p.synthetic) continue1405                  if (!p.text.trim()) continue1406                  p.text = [1407                    "<system-reminder>",1408                    "The user sent the following message:",1409                    p.text,1410                    "",1411                    "Please address this message and continue with your tasks.",1412                    "</system-reminder>",1413                  ].join("\n")1414                }1415              }1416            }14171418            yield* plugin.trigger("experimental.chat.messages.transform", {}, { messages: msgs })14191420            const [skills, env, instructions, modelMsgs] = yield* Effect.all([1421              sys.skills(agent),1422              sys.environment(model),1423              instruction.system().pipe(Effect.orDie),1424              MessageV2.toModelMessagesEffect(msgs, model),1425            ])1426            const system = [...env, ...instructions, ...(skills ? [skills] : [])]1427            const format = lastUser.format ?? { type: "text" as const }1428            if (format.type === "json_schema") system.push(STRUCTURED_OUTPUT_SYSTEM_PROMPT)1429            const result = yield* handle.process({1430              user: lastUser,1431              agent,1432              permission: session.permission,1433              sessionID,1434              parentSessionID: session.parentID,1435              system,1436              messages: [...modelMsgs, ...(isLastStep ? [{ role: "assistant" as const, content: MAX_STEPS }] : [])],1437              tools,1438              model,1439              toolChoice: format.type === "json_schema" ? "required" : undefined,1440            })
packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:75-116 
75  for (const item of yield* registry.tools({76    modelID: ModelID.make(input.model.api.id),77    providerID: input.model.providerID,78    agent: input.agent,79  })) {80    const schema = ProviderTransform.schema(input.model, ToolJsonSchema.fromTool(item))81    tools[item.id] = tool({82      description: item.description,83      inputSchema: jsonSchema(schema),84      execute(args, options) {85        return run.promise(86          Effect.gen(function* () {87            const ctx = context(args, options)88            yield* plugin.trigger(89              "tool.execute.before",90              { tool: item.id, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: ctx.callID },91              { args },92            )93            const result = yield* item.execute(args, ctx)94            const output = {95              ...result,96              attachments: result.attachments?.map((attachment) => ({97                ...attachment,98                id: PartID.ascending(),99                sessionID: ctx.sessionID,100                messageID: input.processor.message.id,101              })),102            }103            yield* plugin.trigger(104              "tool.execute.after",105              { tool: item.id, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: ctx.callID, args },106              output,107            )108            if (options.abortSignal?.aborted) {109              yield* input.processor.completeToolCall(options.toolCallId, output)110            }111            return output112          }),113        )114      },115    })116  }
packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:169-193 
169      const completeToolCall = Effect.fn("SessionProcessor.completeToolCall")(function* (170        toolCallID: string,171        output: {172          title: string173          metadata: Record<string, any>174          output: string175          attachments?: MessageV2.FilePart[]176        },177      ) {178        const match = yield* readToolCall(toolCallID)179        if (!match || match.part.state.status !== "running") return180        yield* session.updatePart({181          ...match.part,182          state: {183            status: "completed",184            input: match.part.state.input,185            output: output.output,186            metadata: output.metadata,187            title: output.title,188            time: { start: match.part.state.time.start, end: Date.now() },189            attachments: output.attachments,190          },191        })192        yield* settleToolCall(toolCallID)193      })

3. 生活类比

Section titled “3. 生活类比”

模型像项目经理，它说“我要查文件”或“我要执行命令”；工具系统像公司的工具台账和审批台：先确认工具存在、参数合法、权限允许，再派具体工具执行，最后把结果登记回工单。

4. Java 开发者类比

Section titled “4. Java 开发者类比”
  • Tool.Def 类似 ToolStrategy 接口。
  • ToolRegistry 类似 Map<String, ToolStrategy> + 自动装配。
  • SessionTools.resolve 类似 adapter，把内部 Strategy 包装成 LLM SDK 能调用的函数。
  • ctx.ask 类似 Spring Security method interceptor。
  • plugin tool 类似 SPI 扩展。

5. 最小源码路径

Section titled “5. 最小源码路径”
  1. packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts:16-45：工具上下文、结果、定义。
packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts:16-45 
16export type Context<M extends Metadata = Metadata> = {17  sessionID: SessionID18  messageID: MessageID19  agent: string20  abort: AbortSignal21  callID?: string22  extra?: { [key: string]: unknown }23  messages: MessageV2.WithParts[]24  metadata(input: { title?: string; metadata?: M }): Effect.Effect<void>25  ask(input: Omit<Permission.Request, "id" | "sessionID" | "tool">): Effect.Effect<void>26}2728export interface ExecuteResult<M extends Metadata = Metadata> {29  title: string30  metadata: M31  output: string32  attachments?: Omit<MessageV2.FilePart, "id" | "sessionID" | "messageID">[]33}3435export interface Def<36  Parameters extends Schema.Decoder<unknown> = Schema.Decoder<unknown>,37  M extends Metadata = Metadata,38> {39  id: string40  description: string41  parameters: Parameters42  jsonSchema?: JSONSchema743  execute(args: Schema.Schema.Type<Parameters>, ctx: Context): Effect.Effect<ExecuteResult<M>>44  formatValidationError?(error: unknown): string45}
  1. packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts:79-130：wrap 校验参数、截断输出、加 tracing span。
packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts:79-130 
79function wrap<Parameters extends Schema.Decoder<unknown>, Result extends Metadata>(80  id: string,81  init: Init<Parameters, Result>,82  truncate: Truncate.Interface,83  agents: Agent.Interface,84) {85  return () =>86    Effect.gen(function* () {87      const toolInfo = typeof init === "function" ? { ...(yield* init()) } : { ...init }88      // Compile the parser closure once per tool init; `decodeUnknownEffect`89      // allocates a new closure per call, so hoisting avoids re-closing it for90      // every LLM tool invocation.91      const decode = Schema.decodeUnknownEffect(toolInfo.parameters)92      const execute = toolInfo.execute93      toolInfo.execute = (args, ctx) => {94        const attrs = {95          "tool.name": id,96          "session.id": ctx.sessionID,97          "message.id": ctx.messageID,98          ...(ctx.callID ? { "tool.call_id": ctx.callID } : {}),99        }100        return Effect.gen(function* () {101          const decoded = yield* decode(args).pipe(102            Effect.mapError((error) =>103              toolInfo.formatValidationError104                ? new Error(toolInfo.formatValidationError(error), { cause: error })105                : new Error(106                    `The ${id} tool was called with invalid arguments: ${error}.\nPlease rewrite the input so it satisfies the expected schema.`,107                    { cause: error },108                  ),109            ),110          )111          const result = yield* execute(decoded as Schema.Schema.Type<Parameters>, ctx)112          if (result.metadata.truncated !== undefined) {113            return result114          }115          const agent = yield* agents.get(ctx.agent)116          const truncated = yield* truncate.output(result.output, {}, agent)117          return {118            ...result,119            output: truncated.content,120            metadata: {121              ...result.metadata,122              truncated: truncated.truncated,123              ...(truncated.truncated && { outputPath: truncated.outputPath }),124            },125          }126        }).pipe(Effect.orDie, Effect.withSpan("Tool.execute", { attributes: attrs }))127      }128      return toolInfo129    })130}
  1. packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts:132-162：Tool.define 和 Tool.init。
packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts:132-162 
132export function define<133  Parameters extends Schema.Decoder<unknown>,134  Result extends Metadata,135  R,136  ID extends string = string,137>(138  id: ID,139  init: Effect.Effect<Init<Parameters, Result>, never, R>,140): Effect.Effect<Info<Parameters, Result>, never, R | Truncate.Service | Agent.Service> & { id: ID } {141  return Object.assign(142    Effect.gen(function* () {143      const resolved = yield* init144      const truncate = yield* Truncate.Service145      const agents = yield* Agent.Service146      return { id, init: wrap(id, resolved, truncate, agents) }147    }),148    { id },149  )150}151152export function init<P extends Schema.Decoder<unknown>, M extends Metadata>(153  info: Info<P, M>,154): Effect.Effect<Def<P, M>> {155  return Effect.gen(function* () {156    const init = yield* info.init()157    return {158      ...init,159      id: info.id,160    }161  })162}
  1. packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts:203-224：加载本地自定义工具和插件工具。
packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts:203-224 
203        )204        if (matches.length) yield* config.waitForDependencies()205        for (const match of matches) {206          const namespace = path.basename(match, path.extname(match))207          // `match` is an absolute filesystem path from `Glob.scanSync(..., { absolute: true })`.208          // Import it as `file://` so Node on Windows accepts the dynamic import.209          const mod = yield* Effect.promise(() => import(pathToFileURL(match).href))210          for (const [id, def] of Object.entries(mod)) {211            if (!isPluginTool(def)) continue212            custom.push(fromPlugin(id === "default" ? namespace : `${namespace}_${id}`, def))213          }214        }215216        const plugins = yield* plugin.list()217        for (const p of plugins) {218          for (const [id, def] of Object.entries(p.tool ?? {})) {219            custom.push(fromPlugin(id, def))220          }221        }222223        yield* config.get()224        const questionEnabled = ["app", "cli", "desktop"].includes(flags.client) || flags.enableQuestionTool
  1. packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts:229-275：初始化内置工具列表。
packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts:229-275 
229          read: Tool.init(read),230          glob: Tool.init(globtool),231          grep: Tool.init(greptool),232          edit: Tool.init(edit),233          write: Tool.init(writetool),234          task: Tool.init(task),235          task_status: Tool.init(taskStatus),236          fetch: Tool.init(webfetch),237          todo: Tool.init(todo),238          search: Tool.init(websearch),239          repo_clone: Tool.init(repoClone),240          repo_overview: Tool.init(repoOverview),241          skill: Tool.init(skilltool),242          patch: Tool.init(patchtool),243          question: Tool.init(question),244          lsp: Tool.init(lsptool),245          plan: Tool.init(plan),246        })247248        return {249          custom,250          builtin: [251            tool.invalid,252            ...(questionEnabled ? [tool.question] : []),253            tool.shell,254            tool.read,255            tool.glob,256            tool.grep,257            tool.edit,258            tool.write,259            tool.task,260            ...(flags.experimentalBackgroundSubagents ? [tool.task_status] : []),261            tool.fetch,262            tool.todo,263            tool.search,264            ...(flags.experimentalScout ? [tool.repo_clone, tool.repo_overview] : []),265            tool.skill,266            tool.patch,267            ...(flags.experimentalLspTool ? [tool.lsp] : []),268            ...(flags.experimentalPlanMode && flags.client === "cli" ? [tool.plan] : []),269          ],270          task: tool.task,271          read: tool.read,272        }273      }),274    )275
  1. packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts:322-367：根据模型/agent 过滤并返回工具定义。
packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts:322-367 
322          return webSearchEnabled(input.providerID, { exa: flags.enableExa, parallel: flags.enableParallel })323        }324325        const usePatch =326          input.modelID.includes("gpt-") && !input.modelID.includes("oss") && !input.modelID.includes("gpt-4")327        if (tool.id === ApplyPatchTool.id) return usePatch328        if (tool.id === EditTool.id || tool.id === WriteTool.id) return !usePatch329330        return true331      })332333      return yield* Effect.forEach(334        filtered,335        Effect.fnUntraced(function* (tool: Tool.Def) {336          using _ = log.time(tool.id)337          const output = {338            description: tool.description,339            parameters: tool.parameters,340            jsonSchema: tool.jsonSchema,341          }342          yield* plugin.trigger("tool.definition", { toolID: tool.id }, output)343          const jsonSchema =344            output.parameters === tool.parameters || output.jsonSchema !== tool.jsonSchema345              ? output.jsonSchema346              : undefined347          return {348            id: tool.id,349            description: [350              output.description,351              tool.id === TaskTool.id ? yield* describeTask(input.agent) : undefined,352              tool.id === SkillTool.id ? yield* describeSkill(input.agent) : undefined,353            ]354              .filter(Boolean)355              .join("\n"),356            parameters: output.parameters,357            jsonSchema,358            execute: tool.execute,359            formatValidationError: tool.formatValidationError,360          }361        }),362        { concurrency: "unbounded" },363      )364    })365366    const named: Interface["named"] = Effect.fn("ToolRegistry.named")(function* () {367      const s = yield* InstanceState.get(state)
  1. packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:24-116：把内部工具包装成 AI SDK tool。
packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:24-116 
24export const resolve = Effect.fn("SessionTools.resolve")(function* (input: {25  agent: Agent.Info26  model: Provider.Model27  session: Session.Info28  processor: Pick<SessionProcessor.Handle, "message" | "updateToolCall" | "completeToolCall">29  bypassAgentCheck: boolean30  messages: MessageV2.WithParts[]31  promptOps: TaskPromptOps32}) {33  using _ = log.time("resolveTools")34  const tools: Record<string, AITool> = {}35  const run = yield* EffectBridge.make()36  const plugin = yield* Plugin.Service37  const permission = yield* Permission.Service38  const registry = yield* ToolRegistry.Service39  const mcp = yield* MCP.Service40  const truncate = yield* Truncate.Service4142  const context = (args: Record<string, unknown>, options: ToolExecutionOptions): Tool.Context => ({43    sessionID: input.session.id,44    abort: options.abortSignal!,45    messageID: input.processor.message.id,46    callID: options.toolCallId,47    extra: { model: input.model, bypassAgentCheck: input.bypassAgentCheck, promptOps: input.promptOps },48    agent: input.agent.name,49    messages: input.messages,50    metadata: (val) =>51      input.processor.updateToolCall(options.toolCallId, (match) => {52        if (!["running", "pending"].includes(match.state.status)) return match53        return {54          ...match,55          state: {56            title: val.title,57            metadata: val.metadata,58            status: "running",59            input: args,60            time: { start: Date.now() },61          },62        }63      }),64    ask: (req) =>65      permission66        .ask({67          ...req,68          sessionID: input.session.id,69          tool: { messageID: input.processor.message.id, callID: options.toolCallId },70          ruleset: Permission.merge(input.agent.permission, input.session.permission ?? []),71        })72        .pipe(Effect.orDie),73  })7475  for (const item of yield* registry.tools({76    modelID: ModelID.make(input.model.api.id),77    providerID: input.model.providerID,78    agent: input.agent,79  })) {80    const schema = ProviderTransform.schema(input.model, ToolJsonSchema.fromTool(item))81    tools[item.id] = tool({82      description: item.description,83      inputSchema: jsonSchema(schema),84      execute(args, options) {85        return run.promise(86          Effect.gen(function* () {87            const ctx = context(args, options)88            yield* plugin.trigger(89              "tool.execute.before",90              { tool: item.id, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: ctx.callID },91              { args },92            )93            const result = yield* item.execute(args, ctx)94            const output = {95              ...result,96              attachments: result.attachments?.map((attachment) => ({97                ...attachment,98                id: PartID.ascending(),99                sessionID: ctx.sessionID,100                messageID: input.processor.message.id,101              })),102            }103            yield* plugin.trigger(104              "tool.execute.after",105              { tool: item.id, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: ctx.callID, args },106              output,107            )108            if (options.abortSignal?.aborted) {109              yield* input.processor.completeToolCall(options.toolCallId, output)110            }111            return output112          }),113        )114      },115    })116  }
  1. packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:118-205：把 MCP tools 也接入同一工具表。
packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:118-205 
118  for (const [key, item] of Object.entries(yield* mcp.tools())) {119    const execute = item.execute120    if (!execute) continue121122    const schema = yield* Effect.promise(() => Promise.resolve(asSchema(item.inputSchema).jsonSchema))123    const transformed = ProviderTransform.schema(input.model, schema)124    item.inputSchema = jsonSchema(transformed)125    item.execute = (args, opts) =>126      run.promise(127        Effect.gen(function* () {128          const ctx = context(args, opts)129          yield* plugin.trigger(130            "tool.execute.before",131            { tool: key, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: opts.toolCallId },132            { args },133          )134          const result: Awaited<ReturnType<NonNullable<typeof execute>>> = yield* Effect.gen(function* () {135            yield* ctx.ask({ permission: key, metadata: {}, patterns: ["*"], always: ["*"] })136            return yield* Effect.promise(() => execute(args, opts))137          }).pipe(138            Effect.withSpan("Tool.execute", {139              attributes: {140                "tool.name": key,141                "tool.call_id": opts.toolCallId,142                "session.id": ctx.sessionID,143                "message.id": input.processor.message.id,144              },145            }),146          )147          yield* plugin.trigger(148            "tool.execute.after",149            { tool: key, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: opts.toolCallId, args },150            result,151          )152153          const textParts: string[] = []154          const attachments: Omit<MessageV2.FilePart, "id" | "sessionID" | "messageID">[] = []155          for (const contentItem of result.content) {156            if (contentItem.type === "text") textParts.push(contentItem.text)157            else if (contentItem.type === "image") {158              attachments.push({159                type: "file",160                mime: contentItem.mimeType,161                url: `data:${contentItem.mimeType};base64,${contentItem.data}`,162              })163            } else if (contentItem.type === "resource") {164              const { resource } = contentItem165              if (resource.text) textParts.push(resource.text)166              if (resource.blob) {167                attachments.push({168                  type: "file",169                  mime: resource.mimeType ?? "application/octet-stream",170                  url: `data:${resource.mimeType ?? "application/octet-stream"};base64,${resource.blob}`,171                  filename: resource.uri,172                })173              }174            }175          }176177          const truncated = yield* truncate.output(textParts.join("\n\n"), {}, input.agent)178          const metadata = {179            ...result.metadata,180            truncated: truncated.truncated,181            ...(truncated.truncated && { outputPath: truncated.outputPath }),182          }183184          const output = {185            title: "",186            metadata,187            output: truncated.content,188            attachments: attachments.map((attachment) => ({189              ...attachment,190              id: PartID.ascending(),191              sessionID: ctx.sessionID,192              messageID: input.processor.message.id,193            })),194            content: result.content,195          }196          if (opts.abortSignal?.aborted) {197            yield* input.processor.completeToolCall(opts.toolCallId, output)198          }199          return output200        }),201      )202    tools[key] = item203  }204205  return tools

6. 用户输入到 agent 行动的整体链路

Section titled “6. 用户输入到 agent 行动的整体链路”

7. 核心源码逐段讲解

Section titled “7. 核心源码逐段讲解”

7.1 工具上下文

Section titled “7.1 工具上下文”

路径：packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts:16-26

packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts:16-26 
16export type Context<M extends Metadata = Metadata> = {17  sessionID: SessionID18  messageID: MessageID19  agent: string20  abort: AbortSignal21  callID?: string22  extra?: { [key: string]: unknown }23  messages: MessageV2.WithParts[]24  metadata(input: { title?: string; metadata?: M }): Effect.Effect<void>25  ask(input: Omit<Permission.Request, "id" | "sessionID" | "tool">): Effect.Effect<void>26}

工具不只是函数，它知道当前 session、assistant message、agent、abort signal，并且能更新 metadata 和发起权限审批。

7.2 工具定义

Section titled “7.2 工具定义”

路径：packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts:35-45

packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts:35-45 
35export interface Def<36  Parameters extends Schema.Decoder<unknown> = Schema.Decoder<unknown>,37  M extends Metadata = Metadata,38> {39  id: string40  description: string41  parameters: Parameters42  jsonSchema?: JSONSchema743  execute(args: Schema.Schema.Type<Parameters>, ctx: Context): Effect.Effect<ExecuteResult<M>>44  formatValidationError?(error: unknown): string45}

Java 理解：parameters 是运行时 schema，execute 是 Strategy 方法，ExecuteResult 是标准返回值。

7.3 wrap：参数校验和输出截断

Section titled “7.3 wrap：参数校验和输出截断”

路径：packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts:79-130

packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts:79-130 
79function wrap<Parameters extends Schema.Decoder<unknown>, Result extends Metadata>(80  id: string,81  init: Init<Parameters, Result>,82  truncate: Truncate.Interface,83  agents: Agent.Interface,84) {85  return () =>86    Effect.gen(function* () {87      const toolInfo = typeof init === "function" ? { ...(yield* init()) } : { ...init }88      // Compile the parser closure once per tool init; `decodeUnknownEffect`89      // allocates a new closure per call, so hoisting avoids re-closing it for90      // every LLM tool invocation.91      const decode = Schema.decodeUnknownEffect(toolInfo.parameters)92      const execute = toolInfo.execute93      toolInfo.execute = (args, ctx) => {94        const attrs = {95          "tool.name": id,96          "session.id": ctx.sessionID,97          "message.id": ctx.messageID,98          ...(ctx.callID ? { "tool.call_id": ctx.callID } : {}),99        }100        return Effect.gen(function* () {101          const decoded = yield* decode(args).pipe(102            Effect.mapError((error) =>103              toolInfo.formatValidationError104                ? new Error(toolInfo.formatValidationError(error), { cause: error })105                : new Error(106                    `The ${id} tool was called with invalid arguments: ${error}.\nPlease rewrite the input so it satisfies the expected schema.`,107                    { cause: error },108                  ),109            ),110          )111          const result = yield* execute(decoded as Schema.Schema.Type<Parameters>, ctx)112          if (result.metadata.truncated !== undefined) {113            return result114          }115          const agent = yield* agents.get(ctx.agent)116          const truncated = yield* truncate.output(result.output, {}, agent)117          return {118            ...result,119            output: truncated.content,120            metadata: {121              ...result.metadata,122              truncated: truncated.truncated,123              ...(truncated.truncated && { outputPath: truncated.outputPath }),124            },125          }126        }).pipe(Effect.orDie, Effect.withSpan("Tool.execute", { attributes: attrs }))127      }128      return toolInfo129    })130}

关键点：LLM 传来的 args 是不可信 JSON，所以必须 decode；工具输出可能很长，所以统一截断。

7.4 Tool.define

Section titled “7.4 Tool.define”

路径：packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts:132-150

packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/tool.ts:132-150 
132export function define<133  Parameters extends Schema.Decoder<unknown>,134  Result extends Metadata,135  R,136  ID extends string = string,137>(138  id: ID,139  init: Effect.Effect<Init<Parameters, Result>, never, R>,140): Effect.Effect<Info<Parameters, Result>, never, R | Truncate.Service | Agent.Service> & { id: ID } {141  return Object.assign(142    Effect.gen(function* () {143      const resolved = yield* init144      const truncate = yield* Truncate.Service145      const agents = yield* Agent.Service146      return { id, init: wrap(id, resolved, truncate, agents) }147    }),148    { id },149  )150}

这是工具定义 helper，既返回 Effect，又把 id 作为属性挂上去。TS 这里比 Java 更偏函数组合。

7.5 ToolRegistry 初始化工具

Section titled “7.5 ToolRegistry 初始化工具”

路径：packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts:229-249

packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts:229-249 
229          read: Tool.init(read),230          glob: Tool.init(globtool),231          grep: Tool.init(greptool),232          edit: Tool.init(edit),233          write: Tool.init(writetool),234          task: Tool.init(task),235          task_status: Tool.init(taskStatus),236          fetch: Tool.init(webfetch),237          todo: Tool.init(todo),238          search: Tool.init(websearch),239          repo_clone: Tool.init(repoClone),240          repo_overview: Tool.init(repoOverview),241          skill: Tool.init(skilltool),242          patch: Tool.init(patchtool),243          question: Tool.init(question),244          lsp: Tool.init(lsptool),245          plan: Tool.init(plan),246        })247248        return {249          custom,

内置工具不是写死在 LLM prompt 里，而是统一初始化成 Tool.Def。

7.6 自定义和插件工具

Section titled “7.6 自定义和插件工具”

路径：packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts:203-224

packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts:203-224 
203        )204        if (matches.length) yield* config.waitForDependencies()205        for (const match of matches) {206          const namespace = path.basename(match, path.extname(match))207          // `match` is an absolute filesystem path from `Glob.scanSync(..., { absolute: true })`.208          // Import it as `file://` so Node on Windows accepts the dynamic import.209          const mod = yield* Effect.promise(() => import(pathToFileURL(match).href))210          for (const [id, def] of Object.entries(mod)) {211            if (!isPluginTool(def)) continue212            custom.push(fromPlugin(id === "default" ? namespace : `${namespace}_${id}`, def))213          }214        }215216        const plugins = yield* plugin.list()217        for (const p of plugins) {218          for (const [id, def] of Object.entries(p.tool ?? {})) {219            custom.push(fromPlugin(id, def))220          }221        }222223        yield* config.get()224        const questionEnabled = ["app", "cli", "desktop"].includes(flags.client) || flags.enableQuestionTool

这说明 tool 系统有两个扩展入口：项目/配置目录下的 tool 文件，以及 plugin hook 提供的 tool。

7.7 按模型过滤工具

Section titled “7.7 按模型过滤工具”

路径：packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts:328-332

packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts:328-332 
328        if (tool.id === EditTool.id || tool.id === WriteTool.id) return !usePatch329330        return true331      })332

同一个 agent 在不同模型下可用工具可能不同。这里 GPT 系列部分模型用 patch tool 替代 edit/write。

7.8 SessionTools.resolve 包装成 AI SDK tool

Section titled “7.8 SessionTools.resolve 包装成 AI SDK tool”

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:75-116

packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:75-116 
75  for (const item of yield* registry.tools({76    modelID: ModelID.make(input.model.api.id),77    providerID: input.model.providerID,78    agent: input.agent,79  })) {80    const schema = ProviderTransform.schema(input.model, ToolJsonSchema.fromTool(item))81    tools[item.id] = tool({82      description: item.description,83      inputSchema: jsonSchema(schema),84      execute(args, options) {85        return run.promise(86          Effect.gen(function* () {87            const ctx = context(args, options)88            yield* plugin.trigger(89              "tool.execute.before",90              { tool: item.id, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: ctx.callID },91              { args },92            )93            const result = yield* item.execute(args, ctx)94            const output = {95              ...result,96              attachments: result.attachments?.map((attachment) => ({97                ...attachment,98                id: PartID.ascending(),99                sessionID: ctx.sessionID,100                messageID: input.processor.message.id,101              })),102            }103            yield* plugin.trigger(104              "tool.execute.after",105              { tool: item.id, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: ctx.callID, args },106              output,107            )108            if (options.abortSignal?.aborted) {109              yield* input.processor.completeToolCall(options.toolCallId, output)110            }111            return output112          }),113        )114      },115    })116  }

这就是模型 tool call 到真实执行的桥。

7.9 权限上下文

Section titled “7.9 权限上下文”

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:64-72

packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:64-72 
64    ask: (req) =>65      permission66        .ask({67          ...req,68          sessionID: input.session.id,69          tool: { messageID: input.processor.message.id, callID: options.toolCallId },70          ruleset: Permission.merge(input.agent.permission, input.session.permission ?? []),71        })72        .pipe(Effect.orDie),

工具自己只说“我要 read/edit/shell”，最终规则来自 agent permission + session permission。

7.10 MCP tools

Section titled “7.10 MCP tools”

MCP tool 也被包装进同一个 tools 对象，并且执行前强制 ctx.ask({ permission: key, ... })。来源：packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:118-205。

packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:118-205 
118  for (const [key, item] of Object.entries(yield* mcp.tools())) {119    const execute = item.execute120    if (!execute) continue121122    const schema = yield* Effect.promise(() => Promise.resolve(asSchema(item.inputSchema).jsonSchema))123    const transformed = ProviderTransform.schema(input.model, schema)124    item.inputSchema = jsonSchema(transformed)125    item.execute = (args, opts) =>126      run.promise(127        Effect.gen(function* () {128          const ctx = context(args, opts)129          yield* plugin.trigger(130            "tool.execute.before",131            { tool: key, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: opts.toolCallId },132            { args },133          )134          const result: Awaited<ReturnType<NonNullable<typeof execute>>> = yield* Effect.gen(function* () {135            yield* ctx.ask({ permission: key, metadata: {}, patterns: ["*"], always: ["*"] })136            return yield* Effect.promise(() => execute(args, opts))137          }).pipe(138            Effect.withSpan("Tool.execute", {139              attributes: {140                "tool.name": key,141                "tool.call_id": opts.toolCallId,142                "session.id": ctx.sessionID,143                "message.id": input.processor.message.id,144              },145            }),146          )147          yield* plugin.trigger(148            "tool.execute.after",149            { tool: key, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: opts.toolCallId, args },150            result,151          )152153          const textParts: string[] = []154          const attachments: Omit<MessageV2.FilePart, "id" | "sessionID" | "messageID">[] = []155          for (const contentItem of result.content) {156            if (contentItem.type === "text") textParts.push(contentItem.text)157            else if (contentItem.type === "image") {158              attachments.push({159                type: "file",160                mime: contentItem.mimeType,161                url: `data:${contentItem.mimeType};base64,${contentItem.data}`,162              })163            } else if (contentItem.type === "resource") {164              const { resource } = contentItem165              if (resource.text) textParts.push(resource.text)166              if (resource.blob) {167                attachments.push({168                  type: "file",169                  mime: resource.mimeType ?? "application/octet-stream",170                  url: `data:${resource.mimeType ?? "application/octet-stream"};base64,${resource.blob}`,171                  filename: resource.uri,172                })173              }174            }175          }176177          const truncated = yield* truncate.output(textParts.join("\n\n"), {}, input.agent)178          const metadata = {179            ...result.metadata,180            truncated: truncated.truncated,181            ...(truncated.truncated && { outputPath: truncated.outputPath }),182          }183184          const output = {185            title: "",186            metadata,187            output: truncated.content,188            attachments: attachments.map((attachment) => ({189              ...attachment,190              id: PartID.ascending(),191              sessionID: ctx.sessionID,192              messageID: input.processor.message.id,193            })),194            content: result.content,195          }196          if (opts.abortSignal?.aborted) {197            yield* input.processor.completeToolCall(opts.toolCallId, output)198          }199          return output200        }),201      )202    tools[key] = item203  }204205  return tools

8. 关键 TypeScript 语法复习

Section titled “8. 关键 TypeScript 语法复习”

  • 泛型接口：Def<Parameters extends Schema.Decoder<unknown>, M extends Metadata>。来源：tool.ts:35-45。

  • 条件类型：InferParameters<T>。来源：tool.ts:63-68。

  • Omit：ask(input: Omit<Permission.Request, ...>)。来源：tool.ts:24-25。

  • Record<string, AITool>：工具名到工具对象。来源：session/tools.ts:34。

  • dynamic import：加载自定义工具文件。来源：registry.ts:203-215。

  • object spread：补附件 id/sessionID/messageID。来源：session/tools.ts:93-102。

  • function property：plugin tool 的 execute(args, context)。来源：packages/plugin/src/tool.ts:45-50。

    packages/plugin/src/tool.ts packages/plugin/src/tool.ts:45-50 
    45export function tool<Args extends z.ZodRawShape>(input: {46  description: string47  args: Args48  execute(args: z.infer<z.ZodObject<Args>>, context: ToolContext): Promise<ToolResult>49}) {50  return input

9. 涉及的设计模式和架构思想

Section titled “9. 涉及的设计模式和架构思想”
  • Strategy：每个 tool 是可替换策略。
  • Registry：ToolRegistry 统一发现和筛选。
  • Adapter：SessionTools.resolve 把内部 tool 转 AI SDK tool。
  • Interceptor：tool.execute.before/after 和 ctx.ask。
  • SPI/Plugin：packages/plugin/src/tool.ts 暴露轻量插件 API。
  • Runtime validation：schema decode 保护工具边界。

10. 它如何和 Tool、Provider、Session、文件系统协作

Section titled “10. 它如何和 Tool、Provider、Session、文件系统协作”
  • Provider：ProviderTransform.schema 会按模型/provider 调整工具 schema。来源：session/tools.ts:80。
  • Session：Tool.Context 带 sessionID 和 assistant messageID。来源：session/tools.ts:42-49。
  • Processor：工具 metadata 和 complete 会调用 processor handle。来源：session/tools.ts:50-63、session/tools.ts:108-110。
  • 文件系统：具体 read/edit/write/shell 工具里操作文件或进程，本章只讲工具总线。

11. 如果自己实现 mini agent，这一章对应什么代码

Section titled “11. 如果自己实现 mini agent，这一章对应什么代码”

12. 费曼复述区

Section titled “12. 费曼复述区”

请复述：

  1. ToolRegistry 和 SessionTools.resolve 的职责差异是什么？
  2. 为什么工具参数必须运行时 decode？
  3. 为什么工具执行上下文里要有 ask 和 metadata？

换一种说法：ToolRegistry 管“有哪些工具”，SessionTools.resolve 管“这一轮模型怎么调用这些工具”。

13. 练习题

Section titled “13. 练习题”

入门题

Section titled “入门题”
  1. 找到 Tool.Context，列出它包含哪些上下文字段。
  2. 找到内置工具列表，数出默认有哪些工具。
  3. 找到 tool.execute.before 和 tool.execute.after。

进阶题

Section titled “进阶题”
  1. 解释 patch/edit/write 的模型过滤规则。
  2. 解释 MCP tool 和内置 tool 的包装差异。
  3. 解释截断为什么放在 Tool.wrap 层。

小实现题

Section titled “小实现题”

实现一个 echo tool，参数 { text: string }，执行前调用 ctx.metadata({ title: "Echo" })，返回同样文本。

14. 源码追踪任务

Section titled “14. 源码追踪任务”
  1. 从 SessionPrompt.runLoop 追到 SessionTools.resolve。
  2. 从 SessionTools.resolve 追到 ToolRegistry.tools。
  3. 从 ToolRegistry.tools 追到 Tool.init(read)。
  4. 从 Tool.define 追到 wrap。
  5. 从 plugin tool API 追到 fromPlugin。

15. 面试式自测

Section titled “15. 面试式自测”
  1. Tool 系统为什么要分 Def、Info、Registry、SessionTools 四层？
  2. 如果模型传了错误参数，哪一层负责报错？
  3. 如果 tool output 太长，哪一层负责截断？
  4. 如果一个 tool 要访问外部目录，权限在哪里触发？
  5. 如何让第三方插件增加一个 tool？

16. 下一步阅读建议

Section titled “16. 下一步阅读建议”

下一章读 “文件读写与代码修改”。它是 Tool 系统的最典型落地：路径解析、diff、权限、写文件、格式化、LSP 诊断都会出现。

编辑此页

最近更新： 2026年5月21日

上一页
04. 模型 Provider / LLM 调用 下一页
06. 文件读写与代码修改
基于 Starlight 构建
